drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f2 == false)
then
    insert(new T1(-1000000007, $p0_0.isF2(), false));
    insertLogical(new T1(-1000000007, $p0_0.isF2(), true));
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0($b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f0, f2 == false)
then
    insert(new T1(8, $p1_0.isF2(), false));
    insertLogical(new T1(100, $p1_0.isF2(), false));
    $p1_0.setF2(true);
    update($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
salience 6
when
    T1(f2 != false, f0 >= -4, $b2_0_0 : f2, $b2_0_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R3"
salience -5
when
    accumulate( T0(f0 in (3.0), f1 contains "alpha", $s3_0 : f0); $a3_0 : sum($s3_0) )
then
end
rule "R4"
salience 5
no-loop
when
    $p4_0 : T1(f1 != true, $b4_0_0 : f2, $b4_0_1 : f1)
then
    delete($p4_0);
end
rule "R5"
salience -7
when
    $p5_0 : T1(f0 < 2.5, f1 != false, $b5_0_0 : f1)
then
    delete($p5_0);
end
